summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Dr Plumber JB website - a modern plumbing service website in Bahasa Malaysia. All core functionality working perfectly including contact form backend integration.

design_issues.issue: 1 out of 6 gallery images failed to load

passed_tests: Contact form submission with backend integration
Hero section with emergency badge and trust badges
Navigation links (Perkhidmatan, Tentang Kami, Testimoni, Hubungi)
Phone and WhatsApp links with correct hrefs
Mobile CTA bar on mobile devices
About section with features and image
